rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CAROLINE MARGARET MEHEGAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/12/20. Filed stamped hard copy of amended petition and supporting declaration, as well as of any newly filed pleadings, must be delivered 2 weeks prior to the hearing. NB: the courtesy copies must be filed stamped.

rulings.Case Title: CONS. OF TERRY LEE SPEARS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #12, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/26/2020. The following issues must be addressed: 1) The amount of property on hand at the end of prior account set forth in paragraph 4 of the petition is different from the amount set forth in the attached summary of account and Schedule 1. 2) Paragraph 9 of the petition requests authority to "make the investments", but does not provide any specifics of mutual funds or other products in which the petitioner proposes investing. Also, what is the proposed amount of new investments? Is the petitioner seeking to retain any financial advisor (and if so, how will the advisor manage the conservatee's portfolio and charge fees during the succeeding account period)? 3) An allegation regarding notice to the Directors of State Hospitals and Developmental Services under Probate Code § 1461 must be added to paragraph 11. 4) Interest, dividends, and capital gains reported on Schedule A must be separately subtotaled. CRC 7.575(c). 5) As to the petitioner's request for renewed authority to pay periodic fees on account: A) Has the petitioner filed a proposed hourly fee schedule or statement of compensation in accordance with §§ 2643.1(a) and 2614.7? B) Was notice of how to file an objection under § 2643.1(c)(1) given? C) Were notices under § 2643.1(c)(2) given to the court investigator?

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HILDA H YAO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/12/20. The co-administrators filed an amendment where the Examiner had directed that a supplement be filed. An amending pleading requires the same notice as the pleading it amends. [CRC 7.53(a).] The amendment shows an incorrect calculation of the net distribution to each heir. By no later than 8/5/20, a courtesy copy of Robert Yao's filed consent to the corrected net distribution amount and waiver of notice and consent to the co-administrators' substantial reimbursements to themselves ($159,211.54 to Tony Yao and $27,286.69 to John Yao) must be received by the Examiner.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARGERY LEVY TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/26/2020. The following issues must be addressed: 1) No declaration certifying the retention of the original bank statement is on file. LRSF 14.93D. 2) The fees and costs of the conservator and attorneys for their services rendered in connection with the conservatorship must be requested by separate petition filed in the related conservatorship case. 3) A supplement signed and verified by the petitioner addressing the following issues must be filed: A) Allegations required under Probate Code § 1064(a)(1)-(5) must be provided. B) The ending value of the trust estate is more than $15,000. Why should the bond be discharged and future accountings waived? See LRSF 14.78(A)(7)(e) & Probate Code §§ 2323 & 2628. C) The summary of account must be on a mandatory Judicial Council form (GC-400(SUM)/GC-405(SUM)). CRC 7.575(a)(1). D) What is the relationship between Granada Hotel and Sutter Street San Francisco LLC? E) What is the minimum amount of deposit in the checking account to avoid the bank's monthly service charge? F) What was the purpose of the payment of $153 to Toolworks Inc on 04/15/2018? G) The filing date and document title must be identified for the $435 court filing fee advanced on 03/02/2018. H) The costs advanced on 05/08/2018, 07/25/2018, 09/26/2018 and 01/22/2019 must be itemized. I) Was no bond premium paid in 2019? J) The professional qualifications of Michael Smith to whom the petitioner paid $340 on 04/13/2018 must be described. K) Exhibit D does not contain descriptions required by CRC 7.703(e) regarding the paralegal. CRC 7.754.
